use_cases: Form submission with tactile 3D press feedback
Brand-specific accent buttons with customizable colors
ai_summary: A retro-styled skeuomorphic button component with 3D shadow effects and inset highlights. Features multiple color variants (orange, grays, white) with a distinct press-state animation. The button uses CSS custom properties for dynamic shadow colors and creates a tactile, nostalgic user experience reminiscent of classic UI elements.
